chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 445 of 2018 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No. 3 to 11 2. For order on CMA No.3766/2018 3. For hearing of main case 4. For order on CMA No.3767/2018 02.02.2026 Mr. Muhammad Abbas advocate holds brief for Mr. Muhammad Adnan Moton, advocate for the applicant This matter is pending since 2018 without any progress. Even notice has not been sought till date. Brief was held on behalf applicant’ counsel on previous date and adjournment was sought; same is the case today. It appears that the applicant is not interested in proceeding with this matter. Accordingly, in view of judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of C.I.R. vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Amjad
